heading: Forty years or more: Air Force officers and Space Force officers
label: 9324 Forty years or more: Air Force officers and Space Force officers
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)8924(a)8924(b)10:942 (as applicable to commissioned officers).10:942 (less applicability to commissioned officers).(last 21 words of 3d proviso under “Pay Department”), .June 30, 1882, ch. 25422 Stat. 118In subsection (a), the words “Except as provided in ” are inserted, since, under that revised section, when board proceedings are pending against a commissioned officer, his right to retire under this revised section, which is otherwise absolute, is discretionary with the Secretary under that revised section.section 8786 of this titleIn subsections (a) and (b), the words “or volunteer service, or both” are omitted as obsolete in accordance with an opinion of the Attorney General, 22 Ops. Atty. Gen. 199, , holding that such words refer to volunteer service in the Civil War. The words “upon his request” are substituted for the words “if he make application therefor to the President”.Aug. 30, 1898In subsection (b), the applicability of 10:942 to warrant officers is based on an opinion of the Judge Advocate General of the Army (JAGA 1950/6951, 4 Jan. 1951), which holds that 10:594 (less provisos) makes 10:942 applicable to warrant officers.

Amendments2021— substituted “Forty years or more: Air Force officers and Space Force officers” for “Forty years or more: Air Force officers” in section catchline and inserted “or the Space Force” after “Air Force” in subsecs. (a) and (b).Pub. L. 116–2832018—, substituted “section 9326” for “section 8926” in subsec. (a) and “section 9326(a)” for “section 8926(a)” in subsec. (b).Pub. L. 115–232, § 809(a), renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232, § 806(b)(13)section 8924 of this title1980—Subsec. (a). substituted “section 1186” for “section 8786”.Pub. L. 96–513

Effective Date of 1980 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 96–513section 701 of Pub. L. 96–513section 101 of this titleSept. 15, 1981

children.label: a
children.text: Except as provided in , a commissioned officer of the Air Force or the Space Force who has at least 40 years of service computed under shall be retired upon his request.section 1186 of this titlesection 9326 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: Any warrant officer of the Air Force or the Space Force who has at least 40 years of service computed under shall be retired upon his request.section 9326(a) of this title
